mapper.update:
UPDATE scenic_spot
category_id = #{scenicSpot.categoryId},
scenic_name = #{scenicSpot.scenicName},
description = #{scenicSpot.description},
cover_image = #{scenicSpot.coverImage},
location = #{scenicSpot.location},
longitude = #{scenicSpot.longitude},
latitude = #{scenicSpot.latitude},
open_time = #{scenicSpot.openTime},
price = #{scenicSpot.price},
stock = #{scenicSpot.stock},
is_real_name = #{scenicSpot.isRealName},
status = #{scenicSpot.status},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE scenic_spot SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE scenic_spot SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT id,category_id,scenic_name,description,cover_image,location,longitude,latitude,open_time,price,score,stock,is_real_name,status,view_count,create_time,update_time,is_deleted FROM scenic_spot
is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1
AND scenic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY
view_count DESC
create_time DESC
score DESC
price ASC
price DESC
create_time DESC

SELECT id,category_id,scenic_name,description,cover_image,location,longitude,latitude,open_time,price,score,stock,is_real_name,status,view_count,create_time,update_time,is_deleted FROM scenic_spot WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id,category_id,scenic_name,description,cover_image,location,longitude,latitude,open_time,price,score,stock,is_real_name,status,view_count,create_time,update_time,is_deleted FROM scenic_spot WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
